description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Report Page: Toolbar controls now wrap to a new row on low resolutions so Browse OU and Run Report buttons are always visible
- Report Page: Added a header bar above the grid showing the result count on the left and Columns/Export buttons on the right
- Report Page: Search box placeholder now hides when text is entered
- Report Page: Removed row striping (alternating row colors) and darkened grid lines for better readability
- Main Window: Maximize button icon now toggles between maximize and restore based on window state
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- Bulk Import Users: %username% is now expanded in Home Folder Path, Profile Path, and Logon Script before writing to AD
- Bulk Import Users: Home folder is now created on disk with Full Control granted via SID (avoids identity translation errors for newly created users)
